message:
fix(fusion,ops): add missing index field to hit struct constructors

Wire the index: None field into TwoTierSearcher, ops simulator, and
optimize_params hit builders to match the struct definition added in
613f4b9 (semantic_index tracking through RRF fusion pipeline).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1087,6 +1087,7 @@ impl TwoTierSearcher {
                     doc_id: hit.doc_id.clone(),
                     score: hit.score,
                     source,
+                    index: None,
                     fast_score,
                     quality_score,
                     lexical_score: initial.and_then(|result| result.lexical_score),

@@ -797,6 +797,7 @@ fn build_results(
             doc_id: format!("{instance_id}:doc:{tick_index}:{event_index}:{rank}"),
             score: f32::from(u16::try_from(rank_score).unwrap_or(u16::MAX)) / 100.0,
             source,
+            index: None,
             fast_score: Some(0.8),
             quality_score: Some(0.9),
             lexical_score: Some(4.2),
@@ -1620,6 +1621,7 @@ mod tests {
                     doc_id: "a".to_owned(),
                     score: 1.0,
                     source: ScoreSource::SemanticFast,
+                    index: None,
                     fast_score: None,
                     quality_score: None,
                     lexical_score: None,
@@ -1631,6 +1633,7 @@ mod tests {
                     doc_id: "b".to_owned(),
                     score: 0.5,
                     source: ScoreSource::SemanticFast,
+                    index: None,
                     fast_score: None,
                     quality_score: None,
                     lexical_score: None,

@@ -350,6 +350,7 @@ impl EvalContext {
                     doc_id: self.doc_ids[*i].clone(),
                     score: *s as f32,
                     source: ScoreSource::Lexical,
+                    index: None,
                     fast_score: None,
                     quality_score: None,
                     lexical_score: Some(*s as f32),
